description: Stylish to the T, this fuschia pink tote makes for a perfect wear for the woman of style. Easy to use, spacious and comfortable to carry, this is a must-have in any woman's wardrobe.Height: 16.5"Width: 2.8"Depth: 15"Capacity: 16 litresMade of polyester with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaningBranded zippers and slidersWide synthetic fabric handles with snap buttoned loop for easy carryingOne main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a zippered pocket for easy organizingCareHand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not dry clean or machine washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringLine dryDo not iron
